vocab.meaning: sự thận trọng trong chi tiêu/tài chính
vocab.example: I exercise fiscal prudence when browsing footwear, ensuring I don't get carried away by flashy marketing.

vocab.meaning: chi phí quá cao (đến mức ngăn cản việc mua sắm)
vocab.example: The prohibitive costs of limited-edition sneakers often deter me from making impulsive purchases.

vocab.meaning: một khoản tiền rất nhỏ so với tổng thể
vocab.example: For some, spending $500 on boots is significant, but for collectors, it is just a drop in the ocean.
I am willing to pay a premium price point for shoes that offer superior orthopedic support.

vocab.meaning: những hạn chế về ngân sách
vocab.example: Due to my current budgetary constraints, I’ve had to scale back my spending on designer footwear.

vocab.meaning: chi tiền túi (thường nói về việc mất một khoản tiền lớn)
vocab.example: Buying three pairs of trainers at once left me quite out of pocket this month.

vocab.meaning: đáng từng đồng xu/hoàn toàn xứng đáng với số tiền bỏ ra
vocab.example: These bespoke Italian shoes were expensive, but their durability makes them worth every penny.
I've had to curb my spending on luxury items lately to save up for a summer vacation.
I prioritize material quality over brand names to ensure my investment lasts for years.

vocab.meaning: vung tay quá trán, tiêu xài hào phóng
vocab.example: I’m not the type to be splashy with money; I prefer functional footwear over status symbols.
